description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its length. The grooves are deep and sharply defined, giving the block a ribbed appearance from above. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with a matte, slightly rough stone texture. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle marbling and variations in tone that suggest a natural stone material, possibly granite or basalt. The block is thick and robust, likely intended to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering on its surfaces.
description: A thick, dark stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, solid sides. The block has a ribbed, industrial appearance and a matte stone texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the block's flat face and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top surface.
description_view_1: Side angle reveals the depth and spacing of the grooves, emphasizing the ribbed texture and the block's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the grooves again visible running horizontally across the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle highlights the grooves' depth and the solid, unbroken side surface.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
